mapper.sql: u.id AS userId, COALESCE(NULLIF(ext.nickname, ''), NULLIF(u.username, ''), CONCAT('用户', u.id)) AS nickname, COALESCE(NULLIF(ext.avatar, ''), NULLIF(u.photo_url, '')) AS avatar, COALESCE(ext.bio, '') AS bio, COALESCE(NULLIF(ext.status, ''), 'normal') AS userStatus
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM app_user u LEFT JOIN app_h5_user_profile_ext ext ON ext.user_id = u.id WHERE u.id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
mapper.sql: p.id AS postId, p.user_id AS userId, COALESCE(NULLIF(ext.nickname, ''), NULLIF(u.username, ''), CONCAT('用户', p.user_id)) AS nickname, COALESCE(NULLIF(ext.avatar, ''), NULLIF(u.photo_url, '')) AS avatar, COALESCE(ext.bio, '') AS bio, p.content AS content, p.source_type AS sourceType, p.status AS status, p.open_comments AS openComments, p.like_count AS likeCount, p.comment_count AS commentCount, p.view_count AS viewCount, p.created_at AS createdAt, p.updated_at AS updatedAt, CASE WHEN l.id IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS liked, CASE WHEN f.id IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS followed, CASE WHEN sf.id IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS friend, CASE WHEN fr.id IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS friendRequestPending, fr.id AS outgoingFriendRequestId, CASE WHEN inbound_fr.id IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS incomingFriendRequestPending, inbound_fr.id AS incomingFriendRequestId
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM app_community_post p LEFT JOIN app_user u ON u.id = p.user_id LEFT JOIN app_h5_user_profile_ext ext ON ext.user_id = p.user_id LEFT JOIN app_community_like l ON l.post_id = p.id AND l.user_id = #{viewerId} LEFT JOIN app_community_follow f ON f.from_user_id = #{viewerId} AND f.to_user_id = p.user_id LEFT JOIN app_social_friend sf ON sf.user_id = #{viewerId} AND sf.friend_user_id = p.user_id AND sf.status = 'normal' AND sf.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN app_social_friend_request fr ON fr.requester_user_id = #{viewerId} AND fr.target_user_id = p.user_id AND fr.status = 'pending' LEFT JOIN app_social_friend_request inbound_fr ON inbound_fr.requester_user_id = p.user_id AND inbound_fr.target_user_id = #{viewerId} AND inbound_fr.status = 'pending' WHERE AND p.id = #{postId} LIMIT 1
SELECT id AS postId, user_id AS userId, status AS status, deleted_at AS deletedAt FROM app_community_post WHERE id = #{postId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE app_community_post SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{postId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO app_community_like (post_id, user_id, to_user_id) VALUES (#{postId}, #{userId}, #{toUserId})
mapper.select: SELECT c.id AS commentId, c.post_id AS postId, c.user_id AS userId, c.content AS content, c.status AS status, c.deleted_at AS deletedAt FROM app_community_comment c WHERE c.id = #{commentId} LIMIT 1

SELECT c.id AS commentId, c.post_id AS postId, c.user_id AS userId, COALESCE(NULLIF(ext.nickname, ''), NULLIF(u.username, ''), CONCAT('用户', c.user_id)) AS nickname, COALESCE(NULLIF(ext.avatar, ''), NULLIF(u.photo_url, '')) AS avatar, c.content AS content, c.reply_count AS replyCount, c.status AS status, c.created_at AS createdAt FROM app_community_comment c LEFT JOIN app_user u ON u.id = c.user_id LEFT JOIN app_h5_user_profile_ext ext ON ext.user_id = c.user_id WHERE c.post_id = #{postId} AND c.deleted_at IS NULL AND c.status = 'normal' ORDER BY c.created_at ASC, c.id ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT r.id AS replyId, r.comment_id AS commentId, r.post_id AS postId, r.from_user_id AS fromUserId, COALESCE(NULLIF(from_ext.nickname, ''), NULLIF(from_user.username, ''), CONCAT('用户', r.from_user_id)) AS fromNickname, COALESCE(NULLIF(from_ext.avatar, ''), NULLIF(from_user.photo_url, '')) AS fromAvatar, r.to_user_id AS toUserId, COALESCE(NULLIF(to_ext.nickname, ''), NULLIF(to_user.username, ''), '') AS toNickname, r.content AS content, r.status AS status, r.created_at AS createdAt FROM app_community_comment_reply r LEFT JOIN app_user from_user ON from_user.id = r.from_user_id LEFT JOIN app_h5_user_profile_ext from_ext ON from_ext.user_id = r.from_user_id LEFT JOIN app_user to_user ON to_user.id = r.to_user_id LEFT JOIN app_h5_user_profile_ext to_ext ON to_ext.user_id = r.to_user_id WHERE r.comment_id = #{commentId} AND r.deleted_at IS NULL AND r.status = 'normal' ORDER BY r.created_at ASC, r.id ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT id AS requestId, requester_user_id AS requesterUserId, target_user_id AS targetUserId, request_message AS requestMessage, status AS status, handled_by_user_id AS handledByUserId, handled_at AS handledAt, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM app_social_friend_request WHERE requester_user_id = #{requesterUserId} AND target_user_id = #{targetUserId} LIMIT 1

SELECT id AS requestId, requester_user_id AS requesterUserId, target_user_id AS targetUserId, request_message AS requestMessage, status AS status, handled_by_user_id AS handledByUserId, handled_at AS handledAt, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM app_social_friend_request WHERE requester_user_id = #{requesterUserId} AND target_user_id = #{targetUserId} AND status = 'pending' LIMIT 1

SELECT id AS requestId, requester_user_id AS requesterUserId, target_user_id AS targetUserId, request_message AS requestMessage, status AS status, handled_by_user_id AS handledByUserId, handled_at AS handledAt, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM app_social_friend_request WHERE id = #{requestId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO app_social_friend_request ( requester_user_id, target_user_id, request_message, status, handled_by_user_id, handled_at ) VALUES ( #{requesterUserId}, #{targetUserId}, #{requestMessage}, 'pending', NULL, NULL ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE request_message = VALUES(request_message), status = 'pending', handled_by_user_id = NULL, handled_at = NULL, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.update: UPDATE app_social_friend_request SET status = #{status}, handled_by_user_id = #{handledByUserId}, handled_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{requestId}

UPDATE app_social_friend_request SET status = #{status}, handled_by_user_id = #{handledByUserId}, handled_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE requester_user_id = #{requesterUserId} AND target_user_id = #{targetUserId} AND status = 'pending'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO app_social_friend ( user_id, friend_user_id, source_request_id, status, deleted_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{friendUserId}, #{requestId}, 'normal', NULL ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE source_request_id = COALESCE(VALUES(source_request_id), source_request_id), status = 'normal', deleted_at = NULL, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.update: UPDATE app_social_friend SET status = 'deleted', deleted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND friend_user_id = #{friendUserId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO app_social_block (user_id, blocked_user_id, reason, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{blockedUserId}, #{reason}, 'active') ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE reason = VALUES(reason), status = 'active', updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM app_social_block WHERE status = 'active' AND ( (user_id = #{userId} AND blocked_user_id = #{peerUserId}) OR (user_id = #{peerUserId} AND blocked_user_id = #{userId}) )

if.test: status != null and status != '' and status != 'all'

mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM app_social_friend_request r

SELECT r.id AS requestId, r.requester_user_id AS requesterUserId, r.target_user_id AS targetUserId, r.request_message AS requestMessage, r.status AS status, r.handled_by_user_id AS handledByUserId, r.handled_at AS handledAt, r.created_at AS createdAt, r.updated_at AS updatedAt, COALESCE(NULLIF(requester_ext.nickname, ''), NULLIF(requester.username, ''), CONCAT('用户', requester.id)) AS requesterNickname, COALESCE(NULLIF(requester_ext.avatar, ''), NULLIF(requester.photo_url, '')) AS requesterAvatar, COALESCE(requester_ext.bio, '') AS requesterBio, COALESCE(NULLIF(requester_ext.status, ''), 'normal') AS requesterUserStatus, COALESCE(NULLIF(target_ext.nickname, ''), NULLIF(target.username, ''), CONCAT('用户', target.id)) AS targetNickname, COALESCE(NULLIF(target_ext.avatar, ''), NULLIF(target.photo_url, '')) AS targetAvatar, COALESCE(target_ext.bio, '') AS targetBio, COALESCE(NULLIF(target_ext.status, ''), 'normal') AS targetUserStatus FROM app_social_friend_request r JOIN app_user requester ON requester.id = r.requester_user_id LEFT JOIN app_h5_user_profile_ext requester_ext ON requester_ext.user_id = r.requester_user_id JOIN app_user target ON target.id = r.target_user_id LEFT JOIN app_h5_user_profile_ext target_ext ON target_ext.user_id = r.target_user_id
ORDER BY CASE WHEN r.status = 'pending' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC, r.updated_at DESC, r.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM app_social_friend f LEFT JOIN app_community_follow follow ON follow.from_user_id = #{userId} AND follow.to_user_id = f.friend_user_id LEFT JOIN app_community_follow back ON back.from_user_id = f.friend_user_id AND back.to_user_id = #{userId} LEFT JOIN app_h5_user_profile_ext ext ON ext.user_id = f.friend_user_id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} AND f.status = 'normal' AND f.deleted_at IS NULL AND COALESCE(NULLIF(ext.status, ''), 'normal') != 'disabled'
AND follow.id IS NOT NULL AND back.id IS NOT NULL
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM app_social_block b WHERE b.user_id = #{userId} AND b.blocked_user_id = f.friend_user_id AND b.status = 'active' )

SELECT f.friend_user_id AS userId, COALESCE(NULLIF(ext.nickname, ''), NULLIF(u.username, ''), CONCAT('用户', f.friend_user_id)) AS nickname, COALESCE(NULLIF(ext.avatar, ''), NULLIF(u.photo_url, '')) AS avatar, COALESCE(ext.bio, '') AS bio, COALESCE(NULLIF(ext.status, ''), 'normal') AS userStatus, f.source_request_id AS sourceRequestId, f.created_at AS friendedAt, CASE WHEN follow.id IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS followed, CASE WHEN back.id IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS followedByPeer, CASE WHEN follow.id IS NOT NULL AND back.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS mutual, CASE WHEN block.id IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS blocked, c.id AS conversationId, c.conversation_key AS conversationKey, c.last_message_preview AS lastMessagePreview, c.last_message_at AS lastMessageAt, c.unread_count AS unreadCount FROM app_social_friend f JOIN app_user u ON u.id = f.friend_user_id LEFT JOIN app_h5_user_profile_ext ext ON ext.user_id = f.friend_user_id LEFT JOIN app_community_follow follow ON follow.from_user_id = #{userId} AND follow.to_user_id = f.friend_user_id LEFT JOIN app_community_follow back ON back.from_user_id = f.friend_user_id AND back.to_user_id = #{userId} LEFT JOIN app_social_block block ON block.user_id = #{userId} AND block.blocked_user_id = f.friend_user_id AND block.status = 'active' LEFT JOIN app_human_chat_conversation c ON c.user_id = #{userId} AND c.peer_user_id = f.friend_user_id AND c.status = 'normal' WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} AND f.status = 'normal' AND f.deleted_at IS NULL AND COALESCE(NULLIF(ext.status, ''), 'normal') != 'disabled'
AND follow.id IS NOT NULL AND back.id IS NOT NULL
AND block.id IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY CASE WHEN c.last_message_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ASC, c.last_message_at DESC, f.created_at DESC, f.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM app_community_post p LEFT JOIN app_user u ON u.id = p.user_id LEFT JOIN app_h5_user_profile_ext ext ON ext.user_id = p.user_id

SELECT p.id AS postId, p.user_id AS userId, COALESCE(NULLIF(ext.nickname, ''), NULLIF(u.username, ''), CONCAT('用户', p.user_id)) AS nickname, COALESCE(NULLIF(ext.avatar, ''), NULLIF(u.photo_url, '')) AS avatar, p.content AS content, p.source_type AS sourceType, p.status AS status, p.like_count AS likeCount, p.comment_count AS commentCount, p.view_count AS viewCount, p.created_at AS createdAt, p.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM app_community_post p LEFT JOIN app_user u ON u.id = p.user_id LEFT JOIN app_h5_user_profile_ext ext ON ext.user_id = p.user_id
ORDER BY p.created_at DESC, p.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE app_community_post SET status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{postId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE app_community_post SET deleted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{postId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT p.id AS postId, p.user_id AS userId, COALESCE(NULLIF(ext.nickname, ''), NULLIF(u.username, ''), CONCAT('鐢ㄦ埛', p.user_id)) AS nickname, COALESCE(NULLIF(ext.avatar, ''), NULLIF(u.photo_url, '')) AS avatar, p.content AS content, p.source_type AS sourceType, p.status AS status, p.open_comments AS openComments, p.like_count AS likeCount, p.comment_count AS commentCount, p.view_count AS viewCount, p.created_at AS createdAt, p.updated_at AS updatedAt, p.deleted_at AS deletedAt FROM app_community_post p LEFT JOIN app_user u ON u.id = p.user_id LEFT JOIN app_h5_user_profile_ext ext ON ext.user_id = p.user_id WHERE p.id = #{postId} LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM app_community_comment c LEFT JOIN app_user u ON u.id = c.user_id LEFT JOIN app_h5_user_profile_ext ext ON ext.user_id = c.user_id

SELECT c.id AS commentId, c.post_id AS postId, c.user_id AS userId, COALESCE(NULLIF(ext.nickname, ''), NULLIF(u.username, ''), CONCAT('鐢ㄦ埛', c.user_id)) AS nickname, COALESCE(NULLIF(ext.avatar, ''), NULLIF(u.photo_url, '')) AS avatar, c.content AS content, c.reply_count AS replyCount, c.status AS status, c.created_at AS createdAt, c.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM app_community_comment c LEFT JOIN app_user u ON u.id = c.user_id LEFT JOIN app_h5_user_profile_ext ext ON ext.user_id = c.user_id
ORDER BY c.created_at DESC, c.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT c.id AS commentId, c.post_id AS postId, c.user_id AS userId, COALESCE(NULLIF(ext.nickname, ''), NULLIF(u.username, ''), CONCAT('鐢ㄦ埛', c.user_id)) AS nickname, COALESCE(NULLIF(ext.avatar, ''), NULLIF(u.photo_url, '')) AS avatar, c.content AS content, c.reply_count AS replyCount, c.status AS status, c.created_at AS createdAt, c.updated_at AS updatedAt, c.deleted_at AS deletedAt FROM app_community_comment c LEFT JOIN app_user u ON u.id = c.user_id LEFT JOIN app_h5_user_profile_ext ext ON ext.user_id = c.user_id WHERE c.id = #{commentId} LIMIT 1

SELECT r.id AS replyId, r.comment_id AS commentId, r.post_id AS postId, r.from_user_id AS fromUserId, COALESCE(NULLIF(from_ext.nickname, ''), NULLIF(from_user.username, ''), CONCAT('鐢ㄦ埛', r.from_user_id)) AS fromNickname, COALESCE(NULLIF(from_ext.avatar, ''), NULLIF(from_user.photo_url, '')) AS fromAvatar, r.to_user_id AS toUserId, COALESCE(NULLIF(to_ext.nickname, ''), NULLIF(to_user.username, ''), '') AS toNickname, r.content AS content, r.status AS status, r.created_at AS createdAt, r.updated_at AS updatedAt, r.deleted_at AS deletedAt FROM app_community_comment_reply r LEFT JOIN app_user from_user ON from_user.id = r.from_user_id LEFT JOIN app_h5_user_profile_ext from_ext ON from_ext.user_id = r.from_user_id LEFT JOIN app_user to_user ON to_user.id = r.to_user_id LEFT JOIN app_h5_user_profile_ext to_ext ON to_ext.user_id = r.to_user_id WHERE r.comment_id = #{commentId} AND r.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY r.created_at ASC, r.id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE app_community_comment SET deleted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{commentId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE app_community_comment_reply SET deleted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE app_community_post SET comment_count = GREATEST(0, comment_count - #{delta}), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{postId}
